name: ASPEN GROUP, INC.
summary: PART I . Aspen Group, Inc. is an education technology holding company. AGI has two subsidiaries, Aspen University Inc. ("Aspen University" or "AU") organized in 1987 and United States University Inc. ("United States University" or "USU"). All references to the Company, AGI, Aspen Group, we, our and us refer to Aspen Group, Inc., unless the context otherwise indicates.
